content.speakerText: Thanks for the update—looks like you’re on track.

options.text: Appreciate the feedback—I’ll keep you posted.
Can you send me the report again?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Appreciate the feedback—I’ll keep you posted.' 既表达了感谢，又承诺了后续跟进，符合职场礼貌结束对话的规范。'No problem' 虽然常见，但过于随意，缺乏主动承诺；'I guess so' 回应模糊，不恰当；'Can you send me the report again?' 是请求而非回应，偏离语境。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate all your support on this project.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你对这个项目的大力支持。

options.text: Thanks for saying that—I’m glad I could help.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks for saying that—I’m glad I could help.' 礼貌回应了对方的感谢，并表达了乐意提供帮助的态度，符合职场道别场景的双向礼貌原则。'Sure thing, see you tomorrow.' 虽然友好，但未回应感谢；'Yeah, it was easy.' 显得轻率，缺乏专业性；'What’s next...' 转移话题，忽略情感回应。

content.speakerText: Thanks for wrapping this up so efficiently.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你如此高效地完成了这项工作。

options.text: You're welcome. Let me know if you need anything else.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome. Let me know if you need anything else.' 既礼貌回应感谢，又主动提供进一步支持，体现专业和积极态度。'I didn’t do much.' 过度谦虚，削弱了合作氛围；'Can we schedule another meeting?' 过早引入新议题；'I’m tired now.' 不专业且不合时宜。

content.hint: 这是职场中表达持续更新的固定搭配

content.template: Thanks for your support—I’m ___ to help with anything else.
content.hint: 表达乐意继续协助的常用形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 情感表达搭配：be happy/glade to do

content.template: I really appreciate your time and ___ on this.
content.hint: 在职场感谢中，常与 'time' 并列使用的名词
content.knowledgePoint: 职场感谢高频搭配：time and effort

content.speakerText: Thanks for the update—looks like you’re on track.
expectedAnswers: Appreciate the feedback—I’ll keep you posted.
Thank you for confirming—I’ll make sure to share the next steps by Friday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了感谢并承诺后续行动
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合职场语境，不生硬或过于随意

content.speakerText: I really appreciate how smoothly this project came together.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢这个项目能如此顺利地完成。
expectedAnswers: Thank you—it was a team effort, and I’m glad it worked out well.
I really appreciate that. I’ll make sure to keep you updated as we move forward.
Thanks for recognizing the work. I’ll continue to prioritize clear communication.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并体现合作精神或后续承诺
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词和连接词，如 'team effort', 'move forward', 'prioritize'
表达自然度：语气真诚、专业，避免机械重复或过度简短

content.speakerText: You did a great job wrapping this up. Thanks!
content.speakerTextCn: 你把这件事完成得非常出色，谢谢！
expectedAnswers: Thank you—I’m glad it met your expectations.
Thanks for the kind words. I’ll be sure to apply the same approach to the next phase.
I really appreciate it. Let me know if you’d like a quick summary for the team.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应感谢并体现积极态度或主动提供价值
语言准确性：使用得体的表达如 'met your expectations', 'apply the same approach'
表达自然度：语调自然，避免过度夸张或冷漠回应，符合职场礼仪
